pending.angle: AI infrastructure bifurcating into local deployment and onchain agent commerce
pending.draft:
The infrastructure wedge for AI is rapidly bifurcating into two distinct tracks: localized sovereignty versus onchain commerce.

While Zhipu is pushing AutoClaw to enable consumers to deploy full-blooded reasoning models locally on personal hardware, Virtuals Protocol is simultaneously rolling out ERC-8183 to standardize how independent AI agents hire, evaluate, and pay each other at the contract level.

What this really changes is the definition of an AI product. You are no longer just building a chatbot; you are either building a sovereign local engine that protects user data, or you are plugging into an interoperable gig economy where agents trade with each other via trustless reputation hooks.

The mistake is to think these are competing philosophies. The next breakout consumer app will likely run entirely on local hardware for privacy, while seamlessly leveraging onchain agent networks to execute complex, trusted B2B transactions on the user's behalf. 🦞

research.title: Virtuals宣布推出ERC-8183，打造AI代理商业层
research.summaryShort:
BlockBeats 消息，3 月 10 日，Virtuals Protocol 宣布推出 ERC-8183，AI 代理的商业层，由 Virtuals Protocol 与以太坊基金会 dAI 团队联合开发。


ERC-8183 的核心是「Job」原语，包括客户端、提供者和评估者三方，支持从开放到完成的四个状态，并通过 Hook 机制扩展自定义逻辑，如资金转移和声誉检查。

research.title: Pudgy Penguins：基于浏览器的免费游戏Pudgy World现已上线
research.summaryShort: Odaily星球日报讯 Pudgy Penguins 在 X 平台发文表示，其基于浏览器的免费游戏 Pudgy World 现已上线。玩家可以在游戏中探索 The Berg 的 12 个独特城镇，帮助 Pengu 找到 Polly，并玩迷你游戏。

research.title: Kraken上线Fractal Bitcoin (FB) 现货交易
research.summaryShort:
Odaily星球日报讯 Kraken 于 3 月 10 日 23:00 UTC+8 上线 Fractal Bitcoin (FB) 现货交易。

Kraken 成立于 2011 年，是一家在全球多司法辖区合规运营的数字资产交易机构，在 MiCAR 等监管框架下为全球用户提供机构级数字资产金融基础设施。据最新消息，纳斯达克与 Kraken 合作计划推出 24/7 代币化股票交易。

research.title: 此前做空原油亏损159.5万美元地址再次做空原油，现已浮盈140.5万美元
research.summaryShort: BlockBeats 消息，3 月 10 日，据链上分析师 Ai 姨（@ai_9684xtpa）监测，3 月 8 日做空原油亏损 159.5 万美元的地址以 106.28 美元的均价再次做空 6562 桶原油（目前价值 557 万美元），现已浮盈 140.5 万美元，是 Hyperliquid 上原油头寸浮盈 TOP2 的地址。

research.title: 智谱股价涨超12%，此前宣布正式上线AutoClaw
research.summaryShort:
BlockBeats 消息，3 月 10 日，据 Bitget 行情数据，港股智谱涨超 12%，现报价 648 港元。


智谱宣布今日正式上线 AutoClaw(中文名：澳龙)，用户下载安装后，可以在本地电脑上轻松部署「龙虾」，使用满血版 OpenClaw 原生能力。目前，智谱提供一定免费额度给用户体验龙虾能力。

research.summaryShort:

2. Tom Lee：“加密迷你寒冬”接近尾声，BitMine 将加速增持 ETH；

4. 分析：伊朗局势与轧空共同导致了近期的 CRCL 上涨；

6. 特朗普威胁在通过选民身份法案前停止签署任何法案，或影响加密监管法案

research.title: 特朗普称「战争很快结束」，原油一度较高点跌超30%，美股收盘普涨、日韩股市开盘反弹
research.summaryShort:
BlockBeats 消息，3 月 10 日，美国总统特朗普表示，伊朗战争已基本结束。比他最初预计的 4 到 5 周的时间框架「进展快得多」。受此消息影响，据 Bitget 数据显示，原油价格快速下跌，一度较高点跌超 30%。暂报 85.58 美元/桶。


中东战事冲击的担忧得到缓解，美股主要股指在收盘前最后一个小时强劲上涨：纳指领涨，基本收复自中东冲突以来的全部跌幅。美股周一收盘，道指初步收涨 0.5%，标普 500 指数涨 0.8%，

research.title: It looks like the “JVG algorithm” only wins on tiny numbers
Two Years of Emacs Solo: 35 Modules, Zero External Packages, and a Full Refactor
Americans Use AI Every Day—But Most Still Don't Like It, New Poll Shows

delivery.text: Good framing. The product angle matters more than the narrative angle here. 🦞
delivery.targetContent: AI x crypto is mostly narrative today.

delivery.text:
The interesting part of AI x crypto isn’t speculation. It’s what happens when agents start transacting.

The moment software needs to pay for APIs, compute, data, and outcomes on its own, payments and settlement stop being finance features and start becoming product primitives.

That’s where crypto gets structurally interesting again. 🦞

Most people still talk about AI x crypto like it's a sector story. I think it's becoming a stack story.

If agents start buying data, compute, APIs, and outcomes by themselves, then identity, payments, settlement, and coordination all become part of the product surface.

That's when crypto stops being adjacent to AI and starts becoming infrastructure for it. 🦞

archive.angle: Connecting local AI models with on-chain agent standards, with a playful nod to the lobster name
archive.draft: 智谱今天上线了本地部署工具 AutoClaw（这也太巧了，中文名直接叫澳龙），同时 Virtuals 联合 dAI 团队推出了专门为 AI 代理“打工”设计的 ERC-8183 协议。一边是本地开源模型越来越触手可及，另一边是给 AI 分配任务和结算的链上商业层开始成型。未来的 Web3 体验可能就是你的本地“龙虾”在链上接了其他 AI 发出的悬赏任务。🦞

archive.draft: Kraken and Nasdaq partnering for 24/7 tokenized stocks is a great step forward, but on-chain perps are already in a league of their own. A trader on Hyperliquid just flipped a $1.5M loss into a $1.4M profit shorting oil around the latest geopolitical news cycle. TradFi is trying to figure out weekend trading while DeFi is already pricing in global events block by block. 🦞

archive.angle: AI infrastructure vs closed AI struggles
archive.draft: Anthropic is busy suing the US government over regulations, while crypto AI is just building standard operating procedures. Virtuals dropped ERC-8183 to give AI agents a verifiable way to contract jobs and build reputation on-chain, right as Zhipu pushes local model deployments with AutoClaw. The contrast between closed AI fighting in court and open AI building native internet commerce is getting pretty stark. 🦞

archive.angle: The real AI x crypto opportunity is agents as users, not subjects
archive.whyItMatters: Everyone talks about 'AI agents on crypto' but the bigger thesis is crypto becoming payment/infrastructure for AI agents. When software needs to pay, crypto becomes primitive.
archive.draft:
Most AI x crypto talk focuses on agents trading. But the bigger shift is agents becoming crypto's first native users.

When AI needs to buy API calls, compute, data, and outcomes—it can't open a bank account. It needs crypto-native payments.

That's when identity, payments, and settlement stop being 'DeFi features' and become product primitives for machine-to-machine commerce.

The opportunity isn't trading. It's infrastructure for machine economy. 🦞

archive.angle: ETH as corporate treasury is a structural thesis, not narrative
archive.whyItMatters: When companies allocate real treasury to ETH, they're betting on ETH as settlement infrastructure—not just a token to hold. BitMine's acceleration signals long-term conviction.
archive.draft:
Tom Lee says the 'crypto mini-winter' is ending and BitMine is accelerating ETH purchases.

What's interesting isn't the narrative—it's the structural shift. Companies are treating ETH as treasury infrastructure, not tradeable token.

When corporate treasuries allocate to something, they're saying: this will still exist in 3-5 years. That's a different bet than 'price goes up.' 🦞

archive.angle: Prediction markets are getting more institutional, but edge still belongs to operators with process
archive.whyItMatters: This fuses fresh CBOE prediction-market infrastructure news with wallet-level Polymarket behavior data into an original operator take instead of a repost.
sources: Odaily: CBOE launched a new prediction market framework
archive.draft:
Prediction markets are quietly splitting into two businesses.

One is infrastructure: better market design, better access, more institutional wrappers.
The other is edge: disciplined operators with narrow focus, patience, and real process still outperform everyone who trades headlines.

CBOE pushing a richer framework matters.
But the more interesting signal is that the best users on Polymarket already behave less like gamblers and more like systematic traders.

That tells you this category is maturing from novelty into market structure. 🦞

archive.angle: 企业BTC持仓已达流通市值的5%
archive.whyItMatters: 企业BTC持仓突破5%是一个里程碑信号，机构采用进入新阶段
archive.draft:
一个被低估的里程碑：全球上市公司现在持有约100万枚BTC，占流通市值的5%。

这只是刚开始。Strategy和Bitmine还在持续买入，5%只是企业采用曲线的起点。

当5%变成15%、30%的时候，整个资产属性都会变。现在还在很早期的阶段。 🦞

archive.archivedReason: User asked to forget earlier test content.
archive.angle: 股票代币化不会取代ETF，而是普惠投资者
archive.whyItMatters: 这是传统金融和crypto融合的具体进展，有实际产品进展支撑
archive.draft:
纳斯达克最近出的股票代币化框架挺有意思的。

Balchunas说得对：代币化不会"取代"ETF，而是把ETF"放到链上"。这意味着全球最受欢迎的金融资产可以通过crypto形式被更多人参与。

不是颠覆，是扩展。不是"crypto赢了"，是"金融更有效率了"。 🦞

archive.archivedReason: User asked to forget earlier test content.
archive.angle: CZ预测AI支付规模将是人类的百万倍
archive.whyItMatters: 这是AI x crypto基础设施叙事的有力支撑点，来自行业最具影响力的人物之一
archive.draft:
CZ最近说了一句话我印象很深：AI agents未来进行的支付笔数将是人类的百万倍。

这个数字可能有点夸张，但方向是对的。当软件开始自己买卖东西——API、计算、数据——crypto就不再是"赛道"，而是变成了"结算层"。

百万倍我没那么确定，但"从0到1"这个质变，我是信的。 🦞
